description: Graduated from Carnegie Mellon University Tepper School of Business with a Master's of Business Administration
Started PhD at Washington University in St. Louis Olin Business School
Graduated from Washington University in St. Louis with a Master's of Science in Business Administration
Moved to Boston University Questrom School of Business as a PhD Candidate in Information Systems
Generative Artificial Intelligence, Human Creativity, and Art forthcoming at Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences Nexus.
Received Marketing Science Institute research grant ($5,000) (Co-PI).
Who Expands the Human Creative Frontier with Generative AI? forthcoming at Science Advances.
MSI Alden G. Clayton Dissertation Competition honorable mention
